_comment: Staged work-queue additions from HANDLER_AUDIT-2026-06-24. NOT written to live .work-queue.json directly: that file is ~31KB / 1000+ lines and FUSE reads/writes truncate it silently (a grep on read still works but writes are unsafe). Ingest via the lock-held scripts/queue-edit.ps1 on the next attended/PowerShell-capable queue-drain. IDs are intentionally identical to the 06-23 staged set (carryover, never ingested) so ingest dedupes by id rather than creating triplicate items. Append each to .items only if the id is not already present.

items.prompt: In X:\YesAndScheduler\CLAUDE.md, the build-order note (line 17) reads 'The repo is past that at v0.4.1.' package.json is at v0.5.1 and DESIGN.md document version is v0.5.1. Swap the stale 'v0.4.1' to 'v0.5.1'. Text-only one-token edit; ship via scripts/release.ps1 -Bump none or fold into the next Scheduler release.
items.notes: Auto-safe stale-version-reference swap. Carryover: staged 06-23, never ingested into live queue.

items.prompt: X:\YesAndScheduler\CLAUDE.md line 27 still frames M7.1 as 'the current open scope question ... tracked as a decision in the work queue ... before assuming anything is unbuilt.' DESIGN.md sec21 records M7.1 as SHIPPED in v0.5.0 (2026-06-22): SPA header org-switcher widget, dedicated invite-admin page, and cross-org scope-leak test suite all landed. Rewrite that paragraph so it states M7.1 shipped in v0.5.0 and names the genuine next open question (or 'none open; see DESIGN sec21 status / sec22 roadmap'). Paragraph rewrite -> needs Nick's review, not an auto-swap. Fold item sched-handler-m8-buildrecord into the same edit.
items.notes: Handler currently teaches that shipped M7.1 work is unbuilt; risks rebuilding finished work, the exact trap the handler itself warns against. Carryover: staged 06-23, never ingested.

items.prompt: X:\YesAndScheduler\CLAUDE.md milestone build-record list stops at M7. DESIGN.md records M8 (shift role/notes, holidays + closures, admin-tunable policy settings, visual polish) shipped in v0.3.0, plus the v0.4.x 100-item polish/animation/mobile pass. Extend the handler's build-record to include these so the milestone history matches DESIGN.md. Can fold into sched-handler-m71-shipped-rewrite.
items.notes: Incompleteness, not a contradiction. Pairs with the M7.1 rewrite. Carryover: staged 06-23, never ingested.
